channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish on Grass Verge, 8th March
item.description:
There is large amounts of rubbish on the grass verge at this location. This is usually discarded by the build up of vehicle traffic who attempt to avoid the ULEZ, and then also get stuck by the single track bridge. Please attend and clear the verge. This I may attract vermin to the area which could lead to a health issue for local residents.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maiden Lane, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 43 Shelton St, London WC2H 9FD, 8th March
item.description:
Sinkhole on Shelton Street in front of Costa Coffee urgent action is needed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nottingham Court, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More fly tipping I’m so sorry - this is unending, 8th March
item.description:
A large sofa and cushions have been left here now. Huge thanks for clearing this otherwise more will accumulate. If you know what residents can do to prevent this please tell me as this is so frequent. Appreciated. Thank you southwark council.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Page's Walk, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead bird, 8th March
item.description:
Dead bird on Pavement just under the yellow gate need to remove please thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stonewood Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture and rubbish next to bin, 8th March
item.description:
Can you collect rubbish before more accumulates

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Surrey Terrace, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lamp is loose in ground and leaning over, 8th March
item.description:
Big deep gap at base of pole and is leaning over at an angle. No support in ground. Could fall further and cause injury.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Cutcombe Road, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox on pavement, 8th March
item.description:
Dead
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Riverdale Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Remove this from Datchelor Place, 8th March
item.description:
No Forest or Limes blocking this pedestrian space

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 51, Camberwell Church Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking my driveway, 8th March
item.description:
A damaged car is blocking my drive and I cant get my car out

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lord Warwick Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A dead fox on farm side of the roadside., 8th March
item.description:
I have reported this fox twice now. Can it please be picked up instead of slowly decomposing.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cracking in road surface, 8th March
item.description:
London Road junction of Sydenham Hill in Forest Hill direction pot hole starting to appear

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sydenham Hill, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot Hole, 8th March
item.description:
London Road junction of Sydenham Hill Pot hole in yellow box around Thames Watee cover

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sydenham Hill, Forest Hill, Greater London

item.title: Repair breaking up, 8th March
item.description:
Outside no 108 Wood Vale Pot hole repair is already cracking

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wood Vale, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Westerham Avenue N9, 8th March
item.description:
There are many potholes along Westerham Avenue N9. From the top of Westerham Avenue by Hazlebry Road and working down to the A10, from door 71, there are many potholes and some of them are getting bigger.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westerham Avenue, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter bin requires emptying, 8th March
item.description:
Outside Camberwell old Cometary. Please empty litter bin by bus stop

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wood Vale, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip of car seats in undergrowth, 8th March
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Street Hill, Sundridge, Greater London

item.title: Pot Hole on A10, 8th March
item.description:
There is a pot hole on the A10 opposite house number 10, N9 9UP Edmonton London. It’s getting bigger and bigger.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Great Cambridge Road, Edmonton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on bin on corner of Lassell Street and Old Woolwich Road, 8th March
item.description:
Great if someone could clean this. Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Old Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: E-bike sbandoned in the "middle" of the pavement., 8th March
item.description:
Hazard for partially-sighted, elderly and vulnerable people.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hazelbank Road, Catford South, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Marsden street, 8th March
item.description:
These trees on Marsden street have not been pruned in at least 7/8 years the branches have gone so big it’s touching both sides of the road. Which is blocking all street light. Please prune them and make the street look better
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marsden Street, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
